assertions.assertion: Response clearly states that IdentityServer3 is NOT covered by this migration path
assertions.rationale: Opens with 'No — this migration guide does not cover IdentityServer3.'

assertions.assertion: Response explains that IdentityServer3 is a different product based on OWIN/Katana and .NET Framework, not ASP.NET Core
assertions.rationale: Explicitly states 'IdentityServer3 runs on OWIN/Katana on .NET Framework — not ASP.NET Core' and calls it 'a fundamentally different product.'

assertions.assertion: Response advises migrating from IdentityServer3 to IdentityServer4 on ASP.NET Core first before upgrading to Duende IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: Stage 1 of the recommended path is 'IdentityServer3 → IdentityServer4 on ASP.NET Core' followed by Stage 2 to Duende.

assertions.assertion: Response does not confuse IdentityServer3 with IdentityServer4 v3.x (they are different products)
assertions.rationale: Explicitly distinguishes: 'IdentityServer3 and IdentityServer4 v3.x are not the same thing. IdentityServer4 v3.x is a version of IdentityServer4 that runs on ASP.NET Core.'
